title: HMW DNA extraction from red algae  for Long Read Sequencing
author: Benoît Vacherie

steps_raw.instruction: Extraction Buffer : Prepare 10 mL of extraction buffer (per 200g of material) in a 50 mL tube %s %s
Add 10 ml of extraction buffer to a 50 ml tube. 10 mL, Extraction buffer
Put a mortar in ice. Cool the mortar and pestle with liquid nitrogen until the bubbling stops. Liquid Nitrogen Contributed by users
Grind 200 mg of frozen sample to a fine powder (approx. 2 min). 200 mg, Sample
Transfer the powder to the extraction buffer
Add 20 µl of Beta-mercaptoethanol to the extraction buffer and vortex 5 sec. Beta-mercaptoethanol Contributed by users Catalog #97622-10X1ML
Incubate at room temperature for 1 h with agitation (300 rpm).
Centrifuge with low deceleration 8500 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes, Acc 9 / Dec 6
Transfer the supernatant to a new 50 ml tube.

Add to the supernatant : 0.1 volume (1 ml) of absolute ethanol Ethanol absolute Contributed by users (CAS: 64-17-5) 0.25 volume (2.5 ml) of 3M potassium acetate Potassium Acetate Contributed by users 1 volume (10 ml) of chloroform isoamyl alcoho l Chloroform:Isoamyl Alcohol [24:1] Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #25666 Vortex 2x 5 sec
Incubate for 20 min at -20°C
Centrifuge with low deceleration 8500 x g, 4 °C, 20 minutes, Acc 9 / Dec 6
Gently transfer the aqueous phase to a new 50 ml tube.
Add 2µl of RNase A (100mg/ml) RNAse A (DNAse free) 100mg/ml Qiagen Catalog #19101
Incubate for 30 min at 37°C
Add 1 volume (10 ml) of chloroform isoamyl alcohol Chloroform:Isoamyl Alcohol [24:1] Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #25666 Vortex 2x 5 sec
Incubate for 20 min at -20°C
Centrifuge with low deceleration 8500 x g, 4 °C, 20 minutes, Acc 9 / Dec 6
Gently transfer the aqueous phase to a new 50 ml tube.

Beta-mercaptoethanol Contributed by users Catalog #97622-10X1ML Add to the supernatant : 0.8 volume (≈ 8 ml) of isopropano l Isopropanol Contributed by users 0.1 volume (≈ 1 ml) of 3M sodium acetate Sodium acetate, 3M Fisher Scientific Catalog #J61928 0.2% (≈ 2 µl) of β-mercaptoethanol Beta-mercaptoethanol Contributed by users Catalog #97622-10X1ML
Homogenise by inversion and incubate for 1 hour at -20°C.
Centrifuge with low deceleration 8500 x g, 4 °C, 20 minutes, Acc 9 / Dec 6
Carefully discard the supernatant , gently resuspend the pellet with 1 ml of cold 70% ethanol. 70% ethanol Contributed by users
Transfer the resuspended DNA to a 1.5 ml DNA LoBind tube. DNA LoBind Tubes 1.5 ml Eppendorf Catalog #022431021
Centrifuge with low deceleration 5000 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes, Acc 9 / Dec 6
Carefully discard the supernatant. Air dry the pellet at RT for about 5-10 minutes.
Resuspend the pellet in 50-100 µl of 1X TE buffer. Buffer TE 1x Contributed by users
Allow the DNA to resuspend for 2 hours at 55°C or ON at RT.
Store the DNA at 4°C.

Quantify your sample with a Qubit DNA HS assay .Check the purity of the sample with a Nanodrop (measurements of 260/280 and 260/230 absorbance ratios).Estimate the molecular weight of the sample with a Tapestation and/or a Femto pulse.
Depending on the DNA concentrations and DNA length profiles, deplete short DNA molecules using SRE size selection kits (SRE XS, SRE or SRE XL kits).
QC results obtained on different species.
